enrichment.short_description: Plane is a global payroll platform for paying US employees, EOR hires, and contractors in 240+ countries from one system.
enrichment.starting_price: $19/month per US employee ($0/month for the HRIS module)
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Plane: global payroll, EOR, and contractor payments platform covering US employees, 240+ countries, and free HRIS tools.

features.title: Unified global payroll
features.description: Pays US employees, contractors in 240+ countries, and EOR hires from a single system.

features.title: Free HRIS
features.description: Onboarding, PTO tracking, and team reporting for all worker types at $0/month.

features.title: Open API, CLI & MCP support
features.description: Automation-first design with agent integration (Claude, ChatGPT, custom agents) via MCP.

features.title: Plane Agent (beta)
features.description: AI assistant in Slack for payroll queries and reporting.

features.title: Compliance automation
features.description: State tax registration and locally compliant contract generation.

features.title: Local payment rails
features.description: International transfers with lower fees and fair exchange rates.

pros: Combines EOR, US payroll, and contractor payments in one system
Free HRIS module with no per-seat fee
No minimum charges, setup fees, or cancellation fees across plans
Open API, CLI, and MCP support for AI-agent automation
cons: EOR pricing at $499/month per hire is a premium tier compared to its own contractor/employee plans
Plane Agent AI assistant is labeled beta
No mobile apps mentioned on the site
No founding year, headquarters, or company size disclosed

faqs.question: What does Plane cost?
faqs.answer: Plane charges $0/month for HRIS, $19/month per US employee, $39/month per contractor, and $499/month per EOR hire, with no setup or cancellation fees.

faqs.question: Does Plane support international payroll?
faqs.answer: Yes, Plane pays contractors in 240+ countries and offers EOR hiring in 100+ countries.

faqs.question: Is there an AI assistant in Plane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Plane Agent is a beta AI assistant in Slack for payroll queries and reporting.

faqs.question: Does Plane integrate with accounting software?
faqs.answer: Yes, Plane integrates with QuickBooks for accounting automation.

use_cases.title: Paying global contractors
use_cases.description: Pay contractors in 240+ countries with local currencies and automated 1099/W-8/W-9 tax form collection.

use_cases.title: Hiring without a local entity
use_cases.description: Plane's EOR service lets companies hire full-time employees in 100+ countries without setting up a local legal entity.

use_cases.title: US payroll
use_cases.description: Run multi-state W-2 payroll with automated tax filing for US-based employees.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Plane?
paragraphs: Plane is a global payroll and HR platform that lets companies pay US employees, EOR hires, and contractors across 240+ countries from one system, with a free HRIS module for onboarding and PTO tracking.
It's built for automation, offering an open API, CLI, and MCP support so payroll data can be accessed by tools like Claude or ChatGPT.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Plane is for
paragraphs: Plane suits fast-growing companies managing a mix of US employees, international contractors, and EOR hires that want a single payroll system instead of stitching together multiple vendors.

enrichment.short_description: RemotePass is a global payroll and HR platform for onboarding, paying, and managing contractors, EOR hires, and employees in 150+ countries.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: RemotePass: pay and manage global contractors, EOR hires, and employees in 150+ countries, with SpendCards and an AI insights assistant.

features.title: Global payroll
features.description: Single-payment processing for global and local workforces with multi-currency support.

features.title: HR management
features.description: Guided onboarding, time-off tracking, expense management, and equipment handling.

features.title: Compliance
features.description: Automated, country-specific documentation collection and verification.

features.title: SpendCards
features.description: Instant debit card issuance for team members worldwide.

features.title: Ask AI
features.description: Natural-language interface for HR/finance data insights and workforce analytics.

features.title: Integrations
features.description: Connects with QuickBooks, Xero, FreshBooks, Google Workspace, HiBob, BambooHR, Sapling, Okta, Zoho Invoice, and Wafeq.

pros: Supports contractors, EOR, and direct employees in one platform
SpendCards enable instant debit card issuance for global teams
Ask AI feature for natural-language HR/finance queries
Mobile apps for iOS and Android
SOC2 Type I & II and GDPR compliant
cons: Contractor and EOR plans are priced per worker per month, which can add up for large teams
EOR and Contractor pricing is billed as an annual rate (quoted monthly)
Enterprise plan pricing is quote-only
No founding year, headquarters, or company size disclosed

faqs.question: What does RemotePass cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $15/month per employee for Local Payroll, $39/month per contractor, $299/month per Contractor of Record, and $349/month per Employer of Record hire.

faqs.question: Does RemotePass have mobile apps?
faqs.answer: Yes, RemotePass offers iOS and Android apps.

faqs.question: What is Ask AI?
faqs.answer: Ask AI is RemotePass's natural-language interface for querying HR and finance data and workforce analytics.

faqs.question: What integrations does RemotePass support?
faqs.answer: RemotePass integrates with QuickBooks, Xero, FreshBooks, Google Workspace, HiBob, BambooHR, Sapling, Okta, Zoho Invoice, and Wafeq.

use_cases.title: Paying global contractors
use_cases.description: Onboarding, compliance, and payroll for contractors in 150+ countries.

use_cases.title: Hiring without an entity
use_cases.description: EOR and Contractor of Record plans let companies hire full-time or contract workers abroad without setting up a local entity.

use_cases.title: Issuing global team cards
use_cases.description: SpendCards let distributed teams receive instant debit cards for spending and reimbursement.
use_cases.audience: Finance and HR teams managing distributed spend

features: Payroll and compliance for your own entity employees

long_form_blocks.heading: What is RemotePass?
paragraphs: RemotePass is a global payroll and HR platform that lets companies onboard, pay, and manage contractors, EOR hires, and local employees across 150+ countries.
It adds SpendCards for instant debit-card issuance and an Ask AI feature for querying HR and finance data in natural language.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who RemotePass is for
paragraphs: RemotePass suits startups and mid-market companies building distributed teams that need contractor payments, EOR hiring, and compliance handled in one place.

enrichment.short_description: WorkMotion is a Berlin-based EOR and global HR platform for hiring and paying employees and contractors in 160+ countries.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: WorkMotion: Berlin-based EOR and global HR platform for hiring, payroll, and compliance in 160+ countries, from $31/month per contractor.

features.title: Employer of Record (EOR)
features.description: Hire in 160+ countries through WorkMotion's subsidiary network.

features.title: Direct Hiring
features.description: Employ talent directly with real-time law monitoring and compliance alerts.

features.title: Contractor Management
features.description: Onboard and pay global contractors with automated invoicing.

features.title: Global payroll
features.description: Payroll processing covering contracts and statutory contributions.

features.title: Wanda AI
features.description: AI-powered support tool for the platform.

features.description: Salary, cost, and offboarding calculators plus a country explorer tool.

pros: Covers EOR, direct hiring, and contractor management in one platform
Transparent starting prices published for all three hiring types
IEC Gold Certification for compliance
Serves 1,000+ companies including Trade Republic and Axel Springer
cons: EOR pricing (from $549/month) is higher than the platform's contractor management tier
Only English and German language support confirmed on-site
No mobile app mentioned
Company founding year and size not publicly disclosed

faqs.question: What does WorkMotion cost?
faqs.answer: Contractor Management starts at $31/month per contractor, Direct Hiring at $429/month per employee, and Employer of Record at $549/month per employee (pricing varies by currency).

faqs.question: Where is WorkMotion based?
faqs.answer: WorkMotion was founded in Berlin, Germany.

faqs.question: What is Wanda AI?
faqs.answer: Wanda AI is WorkMotion's AI-powered support tool for its platform.

faqs.question: In how many countries can WorkMotion hire?
faqs.answer: WorkMotion enables hiring in 160+ countries through its Employer of Record network.

use_cases.title: Hiring abroad without an entity
use_cases.description: EOR lets companies employ workers in 160+ countries without setting up a local subsidiary.

use_cases.title: Managing global contractors
use_cases.description: Contractor Management handles onboarding, invoicing, and compliance for freelancers worldwide.

use_cases.title: Direct international hiring
use_cases.description: Direct Hiring suits companies with a longer-term legal presence in a country, with ongoing compliance monitoring.

features: Register as an employer in another country

long_form_blocks.heading: What is WorkMotion?
paragraphs: WorkMotion is a Berlin-based global HR platform offering Employer of Record, direct hiring, and contractor management for companies hiring across 160+ countries.
It publishes starting per-worker prices for each hiring type and includes an AI support tool called Wanda.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who WorkMotion is for
paragraphs: WorkMotion suits companies that want to hire employees or contractors internationally without setting up their own legal entities in every country.

enrichment.short_description: Pinpoint is a cloud-based applicant tracking system with AI hiring tools, branded careers sites, and end-to-end recruitment workflow management.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Pinpoint: cloud ATS with AI hiring copilot, branded careers sites, and workflow automation for talent acquisition teams.

features.title: AI hiring tools
features.description: AI Hiring Copilot, AI Match Score, AI Candidate Filters, AI Criteria Checklist, and an AI Notetaker.

features.title: Branded careers sites
features.description: Multilingual candidate experience with employer branding.

features.title: Flexible workflows
features.description: Multi-stream hiring, approval processes, and automations.

features.title: Selection tools
features.description: Anonymized screening, video interviewing, interview scheduling, and candidate scorecards.

features.title: Onboarding
features.description: Background checks and reference checks.

features.title: Reporting & analytics
features.description: Executive dashboards, time-to-hire metrics, and compliance tracking.

features.title: 100+ integrations
features.description: Native integrations including Slack, LinkedIn, Indeed, Rippling, BambooHR, Checkr, DocuSign, and Microsoft Teams, plus an open API.

pros: AI tools (Hiring Copilot, Match Score, Notetaker) built into the ATS
100+ native integrations including Slack, LinkedIn, Indeed, and BambooHR
ISO 27001, ISO 42001, SOC 2, and GDPR certified
High third-party ratings (G2 4.8/5, Capterra 4.8/5)
cons: No public pricing; requires a sales request for a quote
No founding year, headquarters, or company size disclosed on-site
No documented list of supported languages despite a "multilingual" claim

faqs.question: How much does Pinpoint cost?
faqs.answer: Pinpoint does not publish pricing; interested buyers must request a quote.

faqs.question: Does Pinpoint use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, Pinpoint includes AI Hiring Copilot, AI Match Score, AI Candidate Filters, and an AI Notetaker.

faqs.question: What integrations does Pinpoint support?
faqs.answer: Pinpoint offers 100+ native integrations, including Slack, LinkedIn, Indeed, Rippling, BambooHR, Checkr, DocuSign, and Microsoft Teams.

faqs.question: Is Pinpoint compliant with data and security standards?
faqs.answer: Yes, Pinpoint is ISO 27001, ISO 42001, SOC 2, and GDPR certified.

use_cases.title: High-volume hiring
use_cases.description: Multi-stream workflows and automation help teams manage large applicant pools.
use_cases.audience: Talent acquisition teams at growing companies

use_cases.title: Multi-brand/multi-location hiring
use_cases.description: Branded careers sites and workflows support hiring across multiple brands or locations.

use_cases.title: Regulated-industry hiring
use_cases.description: Compliance tracking and audit trails support hiring in regulated industries.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Pinpoint?
paragraphs: Pinpoint is a cloud-based applicant tracking system that consolidates hiring workflows, candidate management, and onboarding into a single platform, with AI tools for matching, filtering, and note-taking.
It's certified to ISO 27001, ISO 42001, SOC 2, and GDPR standards and connects to 100+ tools including Slack, LinkedIn, and BambooHR.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Pinpoint is for
paragraphs: Pinpoint is aimed at talent acquisition teams, hiring managers, and HR leadership handling multi-stream, high-volume, or multi-location hiring.

enrichment.short_description: Manatal is a cloud recruitment platform with an ATS, AI candidate scoring, and an AI Interviewer that runs automated video interviews.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Manatal: cloud ATS with AI candidate scoring, profile enrichment, and an AI Interviewer, from $15/user/month with a 14-day free trial.

features.title: AI Interviewer
features.description: Conducts automated video interviews 24/7 for unlimited candidates (add-on).

features.title: Candidate sourcing
features.description: Integrates with 2,500+ job boards, including LinkedIn, Indeed, Monster, and ZipRecruiter.

features.title: Applicant tracking system
features.description: Customizable pipeline with a Kanban board interface.

features.title: Recruitment CRM
features.description: Manages client relationships and placements for agencies.

features.title: AI enrichment
features.description: Automatically builds candidate profiles using data from 20+ social platforms.

features.title: AI recommendations
features.description: Scores and matches candidates to job requirements.

features.title: Career page builder
features.description: Create branded, customizable career pages.

pros: AI Interviewer conducts automated video interviews around the clock
Sources candidates from 2,500+ job boards
Low starting price ($15/user/month) with a 14-day free trial and no credit card required
Supports 4 UI languages: English, Spanish, French, German
SOC II Type 2 certified
cons: Open API, SSO, and LLM integrations are limited to the top-tier Enterprise Plus plan ($55/user/month)
AI Interviewer is a paid add-on, not included by default
Custom plan pricing is not public

faqs.question: How much does Manatal cost?
faqs.answer: Annual-billing plans start at $15/user/month (Professional), $35/user/month (Enterprise), and $55/user/month (Enterprise Plus); monthly billing is $19, $39, and $59 respectively.

faqs.question: Does Manatal offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What does Manatal's AI Interviewer do?
faqs.answer: It conducts automated video interviews with unlimited candidates, available as an add-on across all plans.

faqs.question: What languages does Manatal support?
faqs.answer: English, Spanish, French, and German.

use_cases.title: Agency recruitment
use_cases.description: A built-in Recruitment CRM helps staffing agencies manage clients and placements alongside candidate pipelines.

use_cases.title: High-volume candidate sourcing
use_cases.description: Integration with 2,500+ job boards helps teams source candidates from one dashboard.
use_cases.audience: In-house HR and talent acquisition teams

use_cases.title: Automated first-round interviews
use_cases.description: The AI Interviewer screens candidates via automated video interviews before human review.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Manatal?
paragraphs: Manatal is a cloud-based recruitment platform combining an applicant tracking system, candidate sourcing across 2,500+ job boards, and AI tools for enrichment, scoring, and automated video interviewing.
Plans start at $15/user/month with a 14-day free trial, and the top Enterprise Plus tier adds SSO, an open API, and LLM integrations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Manatal is for
paragraphs: Manatal is used by in-house HR teams and recruitment agencies alike, from solo recruiters to staffing firms managing high candidate volumes.

name: Comeet

features.title: Applicant tracking system

faqs.question: How much does Jobvite cost?
faqs.answer: Jobvite does not publish pricing; it uses a modular, quote-based model where customers add modules like Onboarding or AI Companion to a core ATS.

faqs.question: Does Jobvite use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jobvite includes AI-powered candidate matching and an AI Interview Companion.

faqs.question: Who owns Jobvite?
faqs.answer: Jobvite is part of Employ Inc., which also owns JazzHR and Lever.

faqs.question: Does Jobvite support employee referrals?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jobvite includes employee referral program tools.

use_cases.title: Enterprise applicant tracking
use_cases.description: A core ATS with automation handles high-volume hiring pipelines.
use_cases.audience: Mid-size to enterprise talent acquisition teams

use_cases.title: Employer branding campaigns
use_cases.description: Recruitment marketing tools support multi-touch candidate campaigns and branded career sites.
use_cases.audience: Employer branding and recruitment marketing teams

use_cases.title: Structured interviewing
use_cases.description: The AI Interview Companion helps standardize interview consistency across hiring teams.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Jobvite?
paragraphs: Jobvite is an applicant tracking system with AI-powered candidate matching, recruitment marketing tools, and an AI Interview Companion for structured interviews.
It's sold on a modular, quote-based model, letting customers start with a core ATS and add modules like Onboarding or Recruitment Marketing.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Jobvite is for
paragraphs: Jobvite targets mid-sized to enterprise organizations with complex hiring needs across industries like healthcare, retail, manufacturing, and financial services.

enrichment.short_description: SmartRecruiters is an AI-powered talent acquisition platform covering sourcing, ATS, scheduling, and hiring, with plans starting at $14,995.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: SmartRecruiters: AI talent acquisition platform for sourcing, ATS, scheduling, and hiring; Essential plan starts at $14,995.

features.title: Attract
features.description: Conversational AI chatbot, job distribution, recruitment CRM, and text recruiting.

features.title: Select
features.description: Applicant tracking system, AI talent matching engine, candidate screening, and dynamic scheduling.

features.title: Hire
features.description: AI-powered hiring agent, analytics/insights, offer management, and onboarding.

features.title: Winston Intelligence
features.description: AI layer that automates candidate matching, screening, and hiring assistance.

features.title: 200+ integrations

pros: The entry-level Essential plan has a publicly listed starting price ($14,995)
Winston AI layer spans sourcing, matching, and hiring
200+ integration marketplace including native SAP SuccessFactors support
Used by large enterprises like McDonald's, KPMG, and Visa
cons: Only the Essential plan has public pricing; Professional, High Volume, and Complete tiers are quote-only
Aimed at organizations with 50+ employees, less suited to very small teams
Founding year, headquarters, and company size not disclosed on-site

faqs.question: How much does SmartRecruiters cost?
faqs.answer: The Essential plan starts at $14,995; Professional, High Volume, and Complete plans require a custom quote.

faqs.question: What is Winston Intelligence?
faqs.answer: Winston is SmartRecruiters' AI layer that powers candidate matching, screening automation, and hiring assistance across the platform.

faqs.question: Does SmartRecruiters integrate with SAP SuccessFactors?
faqs.answer: Yes, SmartRecruiters offers native integration with SAP SuccessFactors.

faqs.question: What languages does SmartRecruiters support?
faqs.answer: English, German, and French are listed on the site.

use_cases.title: High-volume hiring
use_cases.description: The High Volume plan adds AI candidate screening and conversational AI chat for large applicant pools.

use_cases.title: SAP-integrated enterprises
use_cases.description: Native SAP SuccessFactors integration suits enterprises already on SAP HR systems.

use_cases.title: Recruitment marketing and sourcing
use_cases.description: The Attract module combines job distribution, CRM, and text recruiting for candidate sourcing.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is SmartRecruiters?
paragraphs: SmartRecruiters is an AI-powered talent acquisition platform spanning sourcing (Attract), applicant tracking and screening (Select), and offer/onboarding (Hire), powered by its Winston Intelligence AI layer.
Its Essential plan starts at $14,995, while Professional, High Volume, and Complete tiers require a custom quote.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who SmartRecruiters is for
paragraphs: SmartRecruiters targets enterprise organizations with 50+ employees and high-volume or complex hiring needs, including customers like McDonald's, KPMG, and Visa.

enrichment.seo_meta_description: iCIMS: enterprise ATS with Coalesce AI for candidate matching, sourcing, and onboarding, used by ~25% of Fortune 500 companies.

faqs.question: How much does iCIMS cost?

faqs.answer: Coalesce is iCIMS' purpose-built AI for candidate matching, personalization, and sourcing.

faqs.question: How many companies use iCIMS?
faqs.answer: iCIMS serves 4,400+ companies across 200 countries, including about 25% of Fortune 500 companies.

faqs.question: Does iCIMS have a responsible-AI program?
faqs.answer: Yes, iCIMS operates a Responsible AI program with independent certification for fairness and bias mitigation.

use_cases.title: Enterprise hiring at scale

use_cases.title: High-volume, mobile-first hiring
use_cases.description: Conversational, mobile-optimized candidate experience suits high-volume roles like retail and manufacturing.

use_cases.title: Automated sourcing and nurture
use_cases.description: iCIMS Engage automates sourcing campaigns and candidate nurturing.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is iCIMS?
paragraphs: iCIMS is an enterprise-grade applicant tracking system and AI recruitment platform, with Coalesce AI powering candidate matching, personalization, and sourcing across the hiring process.
It serves 4,400+ companies across 200 countries, including roughly 25% of Fortune 500 companies, and connects to 800+ partner technologies.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who iCIMS is for
paragraphs: iCIMS is built for enterprise organizations across retail, healthcare, manufacturing, and finance that need configurable, high-volume hiring workflows.

enrichment.short_description: Bullhorn is a cloud ATS and CRM for staffing and recruitment agencies, used by 80% of the world's largest staffing firms.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Bullhorn: cloud ATS and CRM for staffing agencies, with an Amplify AI suite and 300+ integrations; founded in 2000, HQ in Boston.

features.title: Amplify AI Suite
features.description: Includes Chat, Digital Workers, and Search & Match AI capabilities.

features.title: ATS & CRM
features.description: Applicant tracking and customer relationship management in one system.

features.title: Automation
features.description: Recruitment workflow automation.

features.title: Middle Office
features.description: Payroll and worker payment processing.

features.title: Reporting & analytics
features.description: Business intelligence tools for staffing operations.

features.title: Onboarding
features.description: New employee setup workflows.

pros: Purpose-built for staffing agencies, combining ATS, CRM, and Middle Office payroll
Amplify AI suite adds AI search/match and "Digital Workers" for repetitive tasks
300+ pre-built marketplace integrations
26 years in business (founded 2000) with 10,000+ customers globally
cons: No public pricing; requires contacting sales
Offered across two distinct platforms (Bullhorn Platform and Salesforce-based Recruitment Cloud), which may add evaluation complexity

faqs.question: How much does Bullhorn cost?
faqs.answer: Bullhorn does not publish pricing on its site; the pricing page directs prospects to contact sales.

faqs.question: When was Bullhorn founded?
faqs.answer: Bullhorn was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Boston.

faqs.question: What is Bullhorn Amplify?
faqs.answer: Amplify is Bullhorn's AI suite, including Chat, Digital Workers, and Search & Match capabilities.

faqs.question: Does Bullhorn offer payroll for staffing agencies?
faqs.answer: Yes, Bullhorn's Middle Office handles payroll and worker payment processing.

use_cases.title: Staffing agency operations
use_cases.description: Combines ATS and CRM to manage both candidates and client relationships in one system.

use_cases.title: Worker payroll for staffing firms
use_cases.description: Middle Office processes payroll and worker payments, handling 1.3 million worker payments monthly.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted candidate search
use_cases.description: The Amplify Search & Match tool and Digital Workers automate candidate matching and repetitive sourcing tasks.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Bullhorn?
paragraphs: Bullhorn is a cloud-based recruitment and staffing software platform that unifies candidate management, client relationships, and job placement operations, founded in 2000 and headquartered in Boston.
Its Amplify AI suite adds AI chat, "Digital Workers," and Search & Match on top of the core ATS/CRM and Middle Office payroll modules.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Bullhorn is for
paragraphs: Bullhorn is built for staffing and recruitment agencies of all sizes, from startups to large enterprise firms; the company reports 80% of the world's largest agencies use it.
